language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the interface and your AI readings.

nav.ai_description: Connect OpenRouter or your own AI endpoint
nav.data_description: Back up or restore your data

time_confidence.unknown: I don't know my birth time

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Update your birth details to recalculate your chart and interpretations.
profile.rectification_description: Refine an uncertain birth time. The rectified time recomputes your chart; your originally-entered time is kept for reference.
profile.ascendant_error: Could not preview the Ascendant for this time.
profile.ascendant_unavailable: Ascendant preview unavailable — the engine is still starting.
profile.ascendant_prompt: Set a birth date and location to preview the Ascendant.
profile.cusp_warning: ⚠ ~{{degrees}}° from {{sign}} — your rising sign is on a cusp; small birth-time changes flip it.
profile.comparison_near: {{sign}} rises only ~{{degrees}}° from the {{neighbour}} cusp. A few minutes' difference in your recorded time would make it {{neighbour}} and shift every house by one sign — the same person at two candidate times.
profile.comparison_flip: Same person, two candidate times: the rising sign changes {{recorded}} → {{rectified}}, so every house shifts by one sign. Weigh this against your life events — it is a possibility, not a verdict.
profile.confidence_hint: Your birth time is {{confidence}}. There is no automatic rectification — you refine it here by hand: nudge the rectified time, watch the Ascendant above, and weigh it against your real life events. This matters most when the lagna sits on a cusp, where minutes flip the rising sign.
profile.location_hint: Timezone will be automatically determined from your location.
profile.regeneration_required_description: Changing birth date, time, or location recomputes your chart on-device.
profile.engine_starting: The on-device engine is still starting. Please try again in a moment.
profile.success_description: Your birth details have been updated and your chart has been regenerated on-device.
profile.processing_description: Computing on-device — this only takes a moment.

rectification_record.title: Your rectification
rectification_record.band_near_tie: Near tie — treat as a hypothesis
rectification_record.events_informed_one: Informed by {{count}} life event you recorded.
rectification_record.events_informed_other: Informed by {{count}} life events you recorded.

people.title: People
people.description: The souls in your mesh — you, family, friends. Each person keeps their own chart, computed on this device.
people.no_anchor_hint: Start by marking your own profile — the mesh is anchored on you.
people.mesh_ready_one: Mesh ready — {{count}} person connected to you
people.mesh_ready_other: Mesh ready — {{count}} people connected to you
people.empty_body: Add the people close to you — family first. Each person gets a real chart of their own, computed on this device; the mesh will weave their skies into yours.
people.add_hint: Next you'll enter their birth details — their chart is computed entirely on this device.
people.anchor_exists: {{name}} is already marked as you — unmark them first.

ai.title: AI Model
ai.description: Choose the AI that writes your interpretations and powers chat. Use the one-click OpenRouter preset, or point AlmaMesh at any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Your key is stored only in this browser and is never required to draw a chart.
ai.info_title: The chart engine never calls the network
ai.info_description: Only the optional interpretation and chat reach your configured AI endpoint, and only with a privacy-redacted chart (no name, no birth date).
ai.intro: Pick the AI that writes your interpretations and answers chat. Use the one-click OpenRouter preset below, or point AlmaMesh at any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — including a local model (default <0>{{endpoint}}</0> via Ollama). Only a privacy-redacted chart (no name, no birth date) is ever sent.
ai.use_openrouter_description: One cloud endpoint, hundreds of models. Prefills the settings — then paste your key and Save.
ai.allow_cloud_label: Allow a cloud endpoint (sends the redacted chart off-device)
ai.api_key_label: API key (stored only in this browser)
ai.privacy_warning: Privacy mode is local-only but the endpoint is not local — interpretation will be refused until you either use a local endpoint or allow a cloud endpoint above.

aiModels.recommended_description: One click sets both models to AlmaMesh's recommended pair: a strong model for the chart reading, a fast one for chat.
aiModels.interpretation_advice: A strong, frontier model is advised here. The chart reading is generated once and is the deepest analysis AlmaMesh produces.
aiModels.chat_advice: A smaller, faster model is advised. Chat already reuses the chart facts and the generated reading, so it doesn't need a heavy model — a quick one (e.g. minimax-2.7) keeps answers snappy.

model.unsupported_body: This browser or device doesn't support WebGPU, so AlmaMesh can't run a model on your device. You can point it at your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama on your machine, or — opt-in — a cloud provider).
model.experimental_tooltip: Experimental CPU inference is not available yet
model.privacy_body: Generate your interpretation privately, right on your device — no account, no server, offline after the first download ({{size}}). Nothing about your chart ever leaves this device.
model.no_webgpu_error: This device does not support in-browser AI (no WebGPU).

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize your experience with display and notification settings
preferences.content_style_description: Choose how astrological information is presented to you
preferences.content_for_you_detail: Simple, practical interpretations focused on life guidance without technical jargon.
preferences.content_for_astrologer_detail: Detailed technical analysis with planetary placements, aspects, and traditional terminology.
preferences.theme_description: Choose between dark, light, or system theme
preferences.info_description: Changes to your preferences are saved immediately and do not affect your chart or use any tokens.

reset.title: Reset chart / start fresh
reset.description: Erase your chart and start over from onboarding. This removes every chart, profile, life event, chat and saved interpretation on this device. Your language and AI-endpoint settings — and the already-downloaded engine — are kept.
reset.modal_body: This permanently erases everything on this device: every chart and profile, your life events, all chat history, and saved interpretations.
reset.modal_preserved: Kept: your chosen language, your AI-endpoint settings, and the already-downloaded chart engine — so a new chart is fast.

regen_modal.title: Confirm Changes
regen_modal.intro: Saving these changes will trigger a regeneration of your personal astrological data.
regen_modal.impact_interpretation_detail: AI will generate a new analysis based on corrected data.
regen_modal.impact_chat_detail: Current chat session will be cleared to prevent inconsistent advice.
regen_modal.insufficient: Insufficient tokens for this operation. Please upgrade your plan or wait for your monthly reset.
regen_modal.flip_ack: This changes your rising sign {{from}} → {{to}} and shifts every house in your chart. I understand and want to continue.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.subtitle: Move all your data — profiles, charts, chat, and settings — to another browser. Nothing is uploaded; you save one file and carry it yourself.
backup.export_hint: Downloads a single file with your profiles, charts, and chat history.
backup.sensitivity_note: This file contains your birth data and chat history — keep it private.
backup.import_hint: Replaces this browser's data with a backup file. A copy of your current data is saved first.
backup.confirm_title: Replace all data on this browser?
backup.confirm_body: This replaces your current profiles, charts, and chat with the backup. A copy of your current data was downloaded first, so you can undo this.
backup.passphrase_prompt_body: This backup is password-protected. Enter its password to restore.
backup.error_bad_format: That file isn't an AlmaMesh backup.
backup.error_too_new: This backup is from a newer version of AlmaMesh. Update the app first.
backup.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
backup.error_safety_cancelled: Import cancelled — we couldn't save a backup of your current data first, so nothing was changed.
